title: narcissus minor subsp. exiguus
intro: Narcissus minor subsp. exiguus, also known as the lesserjoncrispion narcissus, is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to contain alkaloids, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Narcissus minor subsp. exiguus include its potential to act as an antispasmodic, reducing muscle spasms and relieving pain, as well as its possible use in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant may be used in the form of tinctures, infusions, or salves, although further research is needed to fully understand its uses and potential interactions.
